flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Southwest Minnesota State University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.6% → 0.0%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Southwest Minnesota State University rose 18% between 2021 and 2024 (62.7% → 73.7%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Southwest Minnesota State University rose 17% between 2021 and 2024 (2.0k → 2.3k).
